parents.subject: LU-13805 osc: Make unaligned DIO async

commit.subject: LU-0000 ptlrpc: switch to spin_is_contended
commit.message:
LU-0000 ptlrpc: switch to spin_is_contended

A quick test for spin_is_contended.  (This is the easiest
way to get a patch to the system I'm testing on.)

test-parameters: fortestonly

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ic3b2359666d19622d0c0f124ea34d2ae8fb58eb4
